description: Phishing templates exploiting legal authority and fear of litigation

templates.name: Legal Case Document Share
suggested_subject_lines: Legal notice: Case documents require your review
You have been named in a legal proceeding — documents attached
Urgent: Response required to avoid legal action
templates.notes: Best for executives, managers, and legal/compliance staff. Legal threats are high-fear, low-click — but very effective for senior targets.

templates.name: DocuSign – NDA Awaiting Signature
suggested_subject_lines: You have a document to sign
Action required: signature requested on Mutual NDA
templates.notes: The classic e-signature lure applied to legal. Very high credibility; deploy to legal, finance, and exec teams.

templates.name: Legal Hold – Acknowledgement Required
templates.notes: Authority + confidentiality drives compliance. Advanced: targets are reluctant to ignore a legal instruction.
